title: Combat Tweaks
description: A mod adding new, unique enchantments focused on adjusting minecraft combat
body:
Combat Tweaks adds a lot of enchantments that alter Minecraft's combat in a fun way, inspired by Minecraft Dungeons.

Armor Enchantments:
- Exposure: Helmet enchantment, marks attacked entities with glowing and makes them visible through walls.
- Rush: Helmet enchantment, increases your speed for a short time after getting attacked
- Gravity Pulse: Chestplate enchantment, pulls attacker entites towards you.
- Freezing Aura: Chestplate enchantment, freezes all entites in a small area around you.
- Launch: Chestplate enchantment, launches you upwards when jumping while sneaking.
- Dashing: Leggings enchantment, dashes you forward when sneaking mid air.
- Dodging: Leggings enchantment, boosts you backwards when sneaking mid air.
- Leaping: Boots enchantment, makes all your jumps higher.
- Double Jump: Boots enchantment, allows you to jump twice mid air.
- Velocity: Boots enchantment, briefly increases your speed after jumping.

Melee Enchantments:

- Glacier: Sword enchantment, freezes the attacked entity for a few ticks.
- Pain Cycle: Sword enchantment, drains your life increasing your cycle by one when attacking. Whenever it reaches 5, you deal a massive amount of damage to the target depending on the level.
- Electrify: Sword enchantment, electrocutes the target when attacking.
- Void Strike: Sword enchantment, applies a damage multiplier to the target that rises steadily to a max level, then is removed. Multiplier gets reset whenever you attack the target.
- Echo: Sword enchantment, has a small chance to grant another attack quickly after attacking the target.
- Boost: Shovel/Pickaxe enchantment, boosts you upwards when hitting an entity.
- Warp: Rod enchantment, randomly teleports the target when attacking in melee.

Ranged enchantments:
- Infliction: Trident enchantment, applies a bleeding effect to the target when hit with a thrown trident, doesn't work on melee.
- Soul Lock: Trident enchantment, locks the target in place when hit with a thrown trident, and slowly levitates them upwards while dealing damage.
- Implosion: Crossbow enchantment, creates a spherical explosion when shooting a target.
- Chain Reaction: Crossbow enchantment, has a chance to fire arrows in 4 directions when shooting an entity.
- Leeching: Crossbow enchantment, steals a small part of the target's health when shot.
- Rampage: Bow enchantment, applies a random negative effect to the target.
- Ricochet: Bow enchantment, ricochets an arrow to a different direction when shooting a target.
